title: 3.5m DIY Camper Box with Cabover and Underfloor Storage
name: 3.5m DIY Camper Box with Cabover and Underfloor Storage
tagline: Hardtop composite shell for buyers who want to complete their own truck camper fitout.
description: The **3.5m DIY Camper Box with Cabover and Underfloor Storage** is a waterproofed composite shell for buyers who want to complete their own truck camper fitout. It is sold as-is: what you see is what you get.

title: Custom 3.5m Electric Pop-Top Truck Camper
name: Custom 3.5m Electric Pop-Top Truck Camper
tagline: Custom 3.5m electric pop-top truck camper currently available from $49,999.
description: The **Custom 3.5m Electric Pop-Top Truck Camper** is an expedition/truck camper product, so it has been moved out of the Slide-Ons category and into Expedition and On Sale.

title: 7ft Electric Pop-Top Slide-On Camper
name: 7ft Electric Pop-Top Slide-On Camper
tagline: Electric pop-top slide-on camper for single cab utes.
description: The **7ft Electric Pop-Top Slide-On** is built for single cab ute owners who want a lower travel profile with standing room once camped.

youtubeVideo.title: Beyond RV 7ft Electric Pop-Top Slide-On Walkthrough
youtubeVideo.description: Video walkthrough for the Beyond RV 7ft electric pop-top ute camper.

title: Twin Air Compressor Shield
name: Twin Air Compressor Shield
description:
Our updated twin air compressor shields are back in stock and ready for immediate delivery Australia-wide.

The latest design now suits the new style of air tank. Each shield is boxed and ready to ship.

The switch, air tank, and hose connector can be mounted on either side, making the setup…

title: Advent 2150 Hardtop Ute Slide-On Camper
name: Advent 2150 Hardtop Ute Slide-On Camper
tagline: The Advent 2150 is the go-anywhere companion for 4x4 space cab utes and select dual cab ute owners.
description: The **Advent 2150** is built for owners who want a compact hardtop slide-on camper matched to a serious 4x4 ute. It keeps the slide-on range focused on ute platforms while giving buyers a ready-to-roll Beyond RV camper at the confirmed owner price.

keySpecs.label: Suits
keySpecs.value: Space cab / select dual cab utes

title: Advent 2300 Hardtop Ute Slide-On Camper
name: Advent 2300 Hardtop Ute Slide-On Camper
tagline: A hardtop ute slide-on camper with extra base length for longer tray setups.
description: The **Advent 2300** sits in the middle of the Advent hardtop ute slide-on range, giving buyers a longer base while staying within the ute slide-on category.

youtubeVideo.title: Beyond RV Advent 2300 Walkthrough
youtubeVideo.description: Video walkthrough for the Beyond RV Advent 2300 hardtop ute slide-on camper.

title: Advent 2450 Hardtop Ute Slide-On Camper
name: Advent 2450 Hardtop Ute Slide-On Camper
tagline: A larger hardtop slide-on designed specifically for single cab ute platforms.
description: The **Advent 2450** remains part of the ute slide-on range as a build-to-order model. It is designed for single cab utes and is no longer presented as in-stock or on sale.

youtubeVideo.title: Beyond RV Advent 2450 Walkthrough
youtubeVideo.description: Video walkthrough for the Beyond RV Advent 2450 hardtop ute slide-on camper.

title: 3.5m Electric Pop-Top Cabover Family Camper w/ Electric Drop Down Bed
name: 3.5m Electric Pop-Top Cabover Family Camper w/ Electric Drop Down Bed
tagline: Compact 3.5m family truck camper for dual cab Isuzu NPS platforms.
description: The **3.5m Electric Pop-Top Cabover Family Camper** is built for families who want a compact expedition camper body on a dual cab Isuzu NPS. It can be configured as a slide-on or a permanently mounted camper.

youtubeVideo.title: Beyond RV 3.5m Isuzu NPS Pop-Top Camper Walkthrough
youtubeVideo.description: Video walkthrough for the Beyond RV 3.5m Isuzu NPS pop-top camper with electric drop-down bed.

title: 4.7m Hardtop Truck Camper
name: 4.7m Hardtop Truck Camper
tagline: Premier couples truck camper for single cab truck or Unimog platforms.
description: The **4.7m Hardtop Truck Camper** is the premier Beyond RV truck camper option for couples. It can be built for single cab truck platforms or adapted to suit a Unimog, with 2.2m and 2.4m wide configurations available.

youtubeVideo.title: Beyond RV 4.7m Truck Camper and Mercedes Sprinter Motorhome Walkthrough
youtubeVideo.description: Video walkthrough for the Beyond RV 4.7m truck camper and Mercedes Sprinter motorhome.

title: Blue Unimog Overlander Camper
name: Blue Unimog Overlander Camper
tagline: Blue Unimog expedition build with 4.7m camper interior fitout.
description: The **Blue Unimog Overlander Camper** shows a custom Unimog expedition build paired with the 4.7m camper interior fitout. It is a build-to-order expedition platform for buyers who want a serious off-road truck camper with a full living body.

title: Unimog Overlander Camper
name: Unimog Overlander Camper
tagline: Where roads end, the Unimog begins.
description:
The **Unimog Overlander** is Beyond RV's most extreme build. Mounted on the legendary Mercedes-Benz Unimog with portal axles, this is the expedition vehicle for people who genuinely leave all roads behind.

Full composite body, complete live-aboard spec, custom-built to order. Contact us to discuss…

title: Empty DIY Unimog Camper Box
name: Empty DIY Unimog Camper Box
tagline: Custom empty camper box for Unimog and similar expedition platforms.
description: The **Empty DIY Unimog Camper Box** is for buyers who want Beyond RV composite construction as the base for their own expedition fitout. It can be supplied as a hardtop or electric pop-top, either as a flatpack kit or fully assembled box with wiring roughed in.

youtubeVideo.title: Beyond RV DIY Pop-Top Unimog Shell Walkthrough
youtubeVideo.description: Video walkthrough for the Beyond RV DIY pop-top Unimog shell.

name: Sunpatch 15-XC Couples Off-Road Van
tagline: Couples off-road van with 240L fresh water and 200Ah lithium battery.

youtubeVideo.title: Beyond RV Sunpatch 15-XC Walkthrough
youtubeVideo.description: Video walkthrough for the Beyond RV Sunpatch 15-XC couples off-road van.

title: Sunpatch 19-XC Hardtop Couples Off-Road Van
name: Sunpatch 19-XC Hardtop Couples Off-Road Van
tagline: Available for sale now, with final images and additional details coming soon.
description: The **Sunpatch 19-XC** is available for sale now at $68,000. Final owner-supplied images and additional details are coming soon, so this page is deliberately marked for easy update once those assets arrive.

title: Sunpatch 21-XF Hardtop Family Off-Road Van
name: Sunpatch 21-XF Hardtop Family Off-Road Van
tagline: Family hardtop off-road van, currently available with one in stock.
description: The **Sunpatch 21-XF** is the family off-road van in the Sunpatch range. Owner clarification sets this product at $73,000, with one in stock and sleeping for five people.

youtubeVideo.title: SUNPATCH 21-XF FAMILY OFFROAD CARAVAN SHOWCASE
youtubeVideo.description:
In this video, we take an in-depth look at the Sunpatch 21-XF and explore the features that make it one of the most exciting family caravans on the market. Designed for travellers who want to venture further without compromising on comfort, the 21-XF combines advanced full composite construction, a capable off-grid power system, and a spacious family-friendly layout.
At just 2450kg tare weight, the Sunpatch 21-XF offers exceptional towing performance while still delivering the durability and practicality required for off-road touring around Australia.
